name: io.github.namjeongwan/suparch
title: Suparch
description: An open-source MCP server for searching, comparing, and calculating supplement facts.

environmentVariables.name: SUPARCH_CATALOG_POINTER_URL
environmentVariables.description: HTTPS URL of the official immutable catalog pointer.

environmentVariables.name: SUPARCH_CATALOG_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional custom HTTPS SQLite catalog URL; overrides the pointer.

environmentVariables.name: SUPARCH_CATALOG_MANIFEST_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional manifest URL for a custom catalog.

environmentVariables.name: SUPARCH_CATALOG_SHA256
environmentVariables.description: Expected SHA-256 for the catalog snapshot.
